title: 10 best herbal creams for enlarged spleen
description: Olive creams helps with enlarged spleen because they contain potent anti-inflammatory compounds like oleocanthal, which reduces swelling and pain in the abdomen. The antioxidants present in olive oil, such as vitamin E and polyphenols, help protect the liver and spleen from damage caused by free radicals. Additionally, olive creams' soothing properties can calm inflammation and discomfort associated with an enlarged spleen, promoting a smoother recovery process....
